description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Weights & Biases project for a given entity. StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset fetches recent runs via the GraphQL API and emits a DataFrame with run state, summary metrics, and config.

api_key_env_var.label: API Key Env Var
api_key_env_var.description: Env var with a wandb API key (from wandb.ai/authorize).

entity_env_var.label: Entity Env Var
entity_env_var.description: Env var with the wandb entity (user or team) whose projects to enumerate.

runs_limit.label: Runs Limit
runs_limit.description: How many recent runs to fetch per project.
